cases.input: Run bootstrap in a parent workspace.
cases.context: The parent contains child Git repos but is not itself a Git repo.
cases.expected_boundary: Parent may write .spec-first/workspace/*.json only; child repos own .spec-first/graph, .spec-first/impact, and .spec-first/providers.

cases.input: Graph bootstrap completes successfully and provider readiness changes.
cases.context: The setup-owned files graph-providers.json and runtime-capabilities.json exist.
cases.expected_boundary: Write canonical readiness artifacts, but leave setup-owned config inputs unchanged.

cases.input: Live GitNexus MCP works after CLI proof stayed query-unverified.
cases.context: The host session can call GitNexus MCP, but compiled CLI facts remain degraded.
cases.expected_boundary: Do not rewrite .spec-first/graph or set compiled query_ready=true from live MCP evidence.
